data.title: Dell Cuts Discounts As Tariffs Hit, Passes Rising Cost To US Shoppers: Bloomberg
data.description: Dell Technologies Inc (NYSE: DELL) has reduced discounts on many of its computers in light of Trump's tariff announcements and China's retaliatory tariffs. Stock down 5.62%.

data.title: Apple Analyst Slashes Price Forecast On Weak iPhone Demand, AI Revenue Despite Less Tariff Risk
data.description: Jefferies analyst upgrades Apple from Underperform to Hold, lowers price target due to potential impact of tariffs and recession on iPhone demand.

data.title: $5.83 Trillion Lost, Then A 10% Rebound, Then Down Again — Is SPY The New Vegas?
data.description: ETFs saw record gains following recent market volatility and speculation of Fed intervention. Demand for index exposure drove SPY's rare premium.

data.title: Oklo Stock Spikes Ahead Of The Close: Here's What Happened
data.description: The company announced that it was deemed eligible to provide microreactor power systems for military bases.

data.title: Cannabis Stock Gainers And Losers From April 10, 2025
